title: ROLLBACK body (Speaker→System) — request a governed reversal

compensation_token.description: Handle emitted in the original COMMIT's EVENT result (result.compensation.token). Binds the reversal to a specific committed effect.

idempotency_key.description: Rolling back twice under one key replays the original compensation outcome; it never double-compensates. Optional — the System may mint it on the answering PROPOSAL.

$comment: A ROLLBACK is answered by a PROPOSAL (the compensation preview), exactly as PROPOSE is. The previewed compensation is then executed through an ordinary COMMIT, so 'no silent write' holds for free.
